title: 10 best herbal essential oils for cough
description: Lavandula angustifolia, also known as English lavender, essential oils helps with cough because of its natural anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The oil's active compounds, such as linalool and linalyl acetate, have been shown to reduce inflammation in the airways, making it easier to breathe and relieving congestion.
